mapper.insert: INSERT INTO restaurant_tbl (member_no, rest_name, rest_addr, lat, lng, category, phone, hours, rest_content, rest_thumb, created_at) VALUES (#{memberNo}, #{restName}, #{restAddr}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{category}, #{phone}, #{hours}, #{restContent}, #{restThumb}, current_timestamp())
mapper.select:
SELECT r.rest_name, r.rest_addr, r.category, r.ai_review, r.rest_content, r.lat, r.lng, r.phone, r.hours, r.rating_sum, r.review_total_count, ROUND(r.rating_sum * 1.0 / NULLIF(r.review_total_count, 0), 1) AS rating_avg, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM rest_like_tbl rl WHERE rl.rest_no = r.rest_no AND rl.member_no = #{memberNo} ) AS is_like,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM rest_report_tbl rr WHERE rr.rest_no = r.rest_no AND rr.member_no = #{memberNo} ) AS is_report
FROM restaurant_tbl r WHERE r.rest_no = #{restNo} AND r.rest_status = 'NORMAL'
SELECT t.name FROM restaurant_tags_tbl rt INNER JOIN tags_tbl t ON rt.tag_no = t.tag_no WHERE rt.rest_no = #{restNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_tbl r INNER JOIN member_tbl m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE rest_no = #{restNo} ORDER BY r.visit_date DESC
